fields.name: Worksheet Template Name
fields.tooltip: Contains the name of the worksheet template to which the worksheet name is associated.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name you enter for the worksheet.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code of the warehouse the worksheet should be used for.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the worksheet.

fields.name: Template Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the warehouse worksheet template, such as put-away, pick, or movement.
